metadata.description: Free, research-backed Claude skills from NexusPoint.

plugins.name: claude-advisor
plugins.description: A research-backed guide to everything Claude: the surfaces (chat, Code, Cowork), model selection (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku), the ecosystem, the API, plans/pricing, and a 'which should I use for this task' decision framework. Grounded in a 237-source 2026 research synthesis.

plugins.name: marketing-advisor
plugins.description: A research-backed marketing advisor for agencies and founders: ICP targeting, LinkedIn/Instagram strategy, content calendars, cold email, offer positioning and pricing, paid ads, and automation. Grounded in a 234-source 2026 synthesis with a live channel-benchmark scoreboard.

plugins.name: leads-to-crm
plugins.description: An outreach lead router for agencies and teams: pushes manually-scraped leads from per-channel source Google Sheets into the matching outreach CRM, writing a personalized Touch 1 message for each new lead (OpenAI gpt-5.4-mini with a Claude Haiku fallback). Identity-based dedup on the @handle / LinkedIn slug adds only genuinely new rows and never duplicates ones already sent. Instagram + LinkedIn today, configurable to your own sheets via environment variables.
